view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by multiple pieces of evidence. The linked use case describes a scenario where clients visit a booking page, select available slots, and complete the booking process, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the successful execution of the 'customer-book-primary' step confirms that a booking was made, indicating that the booking page functionality is operational and meets the specified need.
